                <article id="post-29237" class="gridlove-box box-vm post-29237 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-freelancingtips tag-seller">
	
 
                        
<div class="box-inner-p-bigger box-single">

    <div class="entry-header">
		<div class="entry-category">
	    
	    	        <a href="https://www.twine.net/blog/category/creatives/freelancingtips/" class="gridlove-cat gridlove-cat-340">Freelancing Tips</a>	    	</div>

    <h1 class="entry-title">9 Best Web Developer Portfolio Examples (and What Makes Them Stand Out)</h1>
        	<div class="entry-meta"><div class="meta-item meta-author"><span class="vcard author"><span class="fn"><a href="https://www.twine.net/blog/author/vicky/"><img alt="" src="https://www.twine.net/blog/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/avatar_user_15_1755611504-24x24.jpg" class="avatar avatar-24 photo" height="24" width="24"> Vicky</a></span></span></div><div class="meta-item meta-date"><span class="updated">October 15, 2025</span></div><div class="meta-item meta-rtime">5 min read</div></div>
    
</div>
    

<div class="entry-content">
    
    	    
    
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">In today’s freelance world, your web developer portfolio is more than a showcase; it’s your personal brand, business card, and proof of expertise all rolled into one.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Whether you’re a web developer, front-end specialist, full-stack developer, or UX-focused engineer, the way you present your work can make or break your ability to land clients. In this article, we’ll explore 9 of the best web developer portfolio examples, what makes them effective, and how to build one that helps you win <a href="https://www.twine.net/jobs">freelance jobs</a>.</p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Why a Strong Web Developer Portfolio Matters</h2>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">With thousands of freelancers competing for similar projects, clients no longer hire based only on resumes; they hire based on results.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">A strong portfolio demonstrates:</p><div class="ai-viewport-2 ai-viewport-3" data-insertion-position="prepend" data-selector=".ai-insert-1-57503515" data-insertion-no-dbg="" data-code="" data-block="1"></div>





<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Technical expertise</strong> (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, frameworks, APIs)</li>



<li><strong>Design sensibility</strong> and attention to detail</li>



<li><strong>Real-world impact</strong>, backed by metrics or testimonials</li>



<li><strong>Problem-solving ability</strong>, shown through project breakdowns</li>
</ul>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Developers who combine clean code, clear storytelling, and creative presentation will consistently attract top-tier freelance work.</p><div class="ai-viewport-1" data-insertion-position="prepend" data-selector=".ai-insert-4-60832199" data-insertion-no-dbg="" data-code="" data-block="4"><div class="code-block code-block-4" style="margin: 8px 0; clear: both;">
<div id="text-20" class="gridlove-highlight widget gridlove-box widget_text">
  <div class="textwidget">
  
    <div class="signup-box" style="text-align: center;">

    <a href="https://www.twine.net">
      <img style="max-width: 80px; margin-bottom: 15px;" alt="Twine" data-src="https://www.twine.net/blog/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/header.png" class="lazyloaded" src="https://www.twine.net/blog/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/header.png">
    </a>
    
    <h4 style="font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700;"><a href="https://www2.twine.net/FreelancerToolkitBlogBanner">Freelancer <span style="color: #44a3f6">Toolkit</span></a></h4>
  
    <p style="font-weight: 700;">500+ curated tools and apps for freelancers and digital nomads</p>
  
    <a href="https://www2.twine.net/FreelancerToolkitBlogBanner" class="button-signup" style="color: #ffffff !important; background-color: #0777DA !important; max-width: 200px; margin: 0 auto;"><span class="button-text">Explore the Toolkit</span></a>

    </div>
  
  </div>
</div></div>
</div>





<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">9 Best Web Developer Portfolio Examples</h2>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">1. <strong>Brittany Chiang – Front-End Developer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://v4.brittanychiang.com/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Brittany Chiang</a> combines minimal design with smooth animations and a clean structure. Her portfolio instantly communicates expertise in modern frameworks like React and TypeScript.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Interactive design elements without overwhelming visuals</li>



<li>Clear project hierarchy with live demo links</li>



<li>Concise “About” section showcasing her technical stack</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">2. <strong>Adrian Twarog – Full-Stack Developer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://adriantwarog.com/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Adrian Twarog</a> integrates YouTube tutorials and coding projects into his portfolio, blending education and expertise.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Personal branding through video integration</li>



<li>Practical, real-world examples</li>



<li>Clear call-to-action inviting collaboration</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">3. <strong>Cassie Evans – Creative Developer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://www.cassie.codes/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Cassie Evans</a> specializes in SVG animation and interaction design. Her portfolio is both technically impressive and visually captivating.</p><div class="ai-viewport-2 ai-viewport-3" data-insertion-position="prepend" data-selector=".ai-insert-2-27735229" data-insertion-no-dbg="" data-code="" data-block="2"></div>





<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Showcases animation mastery directly in portfolio</li>



<li>Authentic tone that feels approachable</li>



<li>Uses playful microinteractions to show skill depth</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">4. <strong>Robby Leonardi – Interactive Resume</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="http://www.rleonardi.com/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Robby Leonardi</a> turned his resume into a game-like experience. His site demonstrates creativity, storytelling, and front-end expertise simultaneously.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Unique interactive concept</li>



<li>Fun UX that keeps visitors engaged</li>



<li>Demonstrates skill through design execution</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">5. <strong>Matt Farley – UX Engineer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://mattfarley.ca/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Matt Farley</a> uses a bold yet minimal aesthetic with clear navigation and consistent branding.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Simple layout focused on usability</li>



<li>Projects clearly tied to outcomes</li>



<li>Mobile-first responsive design</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">6. <strong>Denise Chandler – Web Designer & Developer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://denisechandler.com/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Denise Chandler</a> balances playful illustration with professional polish — ideal for freelance creatives.</p><div class="ai-viewport-2 ai-viewport-3" data-insertion-position="prepend" data-selector=".ai-insert-3-47767806" data-insertion-no-dbg="" data-code="" data-block="3"></div>





<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Eye-catching visuals that reflect personal style</li>



<li>Subtle animations and seamless navigation</li>



<li>Balanced blend of design and technical focus</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">7. <strong>Lynn Fisher – Front-End Developer & Illustrator</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://lynnandtonic.com/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Lynn Fisher</a> frequently redesigns her portfolio to experiment with new design systems — proving adaptability and innovation.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Seasonal or themed redesigns demonstrate range</li>



<li>Playful copywriting and personal tone</li>



<li>Strong sense of personality and experimentation</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">8. <strong>Ryan Fitzgerald – Full-Stack Developer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://rfitz.io/" class="external" rel="nofollow">Ryan Fitzgerald</a> keeps his portfolio simple, showcasing GitHub projects and technical blogs.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Developer-first focus — no fluff</li>



<li>Links to open-source contributions</li>



<li>Great SEO integration through blog content</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">9. <strong>Tim Rijkse – Front-End Developer & Designer</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://www.awwwards.com/sites/tim-rijkse-creative-frontend" class="external" rel="nofollow">Tim Rijkse</a> blends animation, accessibility, and speed in a striking portfolio that feels premium.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What Works:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Subtle motion and transitions</li>



<li>Strong project storytelling</li>



<li>Excellent balance of design and functionality</li>
</ul>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">How to Build a Winning Web Developer Portfolio</h2>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">If you’re ready to create or refresh your own portfolio, follow these key principles:</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">1. <strong>Lead with Your Best Work</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Start with 3–5 high-impact projects that show a range of skills (frontend frameworks, APIs, design integration).</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">2. <strong>Include Context and Outcomes</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Don’t just show, explain. Add short case studies describing challenges, your approach, and measurable results (e.g., “Improved site speed by 45%”).</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">3. <strong>Highlight Your Stack and Tools</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Show your preferred technologies: React, Next.js, Tailwind, Node.js, or Python. Clients want to know you can deliver in their ecosystem.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">4. <strong>Optimize for Mobile and Speed</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">A slow or clunky portfolio site can cost you opportunities. Keep it light, accessible, and mobile-friendly.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">5. <strong>Add a Clear CTA</strong></h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Encourage collaboration with direct CTAs like “Hire Me” or “Let’s Work Together.”</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><img draggable="false" role="img" class="emoji" alt="💡" src="https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f4a1.svg"> <strong>Pro Tip:</strong> You don’t have to build your portfolio from scratch. On <a href="https://www.twine.net/signin"><strong>Twine</strong></a>, you can import your CV and get an auto-built freelancer portfolio in minutes, complete with your skills, experience, and featured projects</p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Where to Find Web Developer Jobs</h2>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Once your portfolio is ready, it’s time to get noticed. Twine is ideal for connecting with verified clients looking for professional web developers.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Why Freelancers Choose <a href="https://www.twine.net/freelancers">Twine</a>:</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Verified, high-quality projects </li>



<li>Opportunities across design, front-end, full-stack, and WordPress</li>



<li>Global client base — startups, agencies, and enterprises</li>



<li>AI-powered matching for relevant job recommendations</li>
</ul>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://www.twine.net/jobs?roles=Web%20Developer&roles=Front-End%20Developer&roles=Full%20Stack%20Developer&rolesHaveChanged=1&status=true"><strong>Browse Web Developer Jobs on Twine →</strong></a></p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Final Thoughts</h2>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The best web developer portfolios don’t just display projects; they communicate expertise, creativity, and reliability.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Whether your style is minimal and code-driven like Ryan Fitzgerald’s or visually dynamic like Cassie Evans’s, the key is authenticity. Keep your portfolio fresh, fast, and honest, and make sure potential clients can instantly see the value you bring.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Ready to land your next freelance project?<br><img draggable="false" role="img" class="emoji" alt="👉" src="https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f449.svg"> <a href="https://www.twine.net/signin"><strong>Build your profile and start applying on Twine today.</strong></a></p>

    <style data-type="cookiescriptstyles">
      #cookiescript_injected {
    background-color: #FFFFFF;
    z-index: 999997;
    opacity: 1;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: normal;
    font-family: 'Open Sans', Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica', sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 1px 2px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
    color: #2d2d2d;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.cookiescript_overlay {
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100vh;
}

.cookiescript_checkbox_label {
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding:0 4px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin:0;
	text-align: left;
}
.cookiescript_pre_header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    align-items: flex-start;
    position: absolute;
    top: 15px;
    right: 15px;
}
/*
.cookiescript_pre_header.cookiescript_with_logo {
    position: initial;
    width: 100%;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #353535;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    padding-bottom: 12px;
}*/

#cookiescript_close {
    font-size: 29px;
    line-height: 13px;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: #2d2d2d;
    height: 15px;
    width: 15px;
    margin: 0 0 0 10px;
    padding: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 100;
    opacity: 0.85;
    z-index: 999999;
    position: relative;
    top: -1px;
}

#cookiescript_buttons {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    font-weight: 700;
}
#cookiescript_manage_wrap {
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.4px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding-top: 2px;
    padding-bottom: 2px;
}
#cookiescript_manage {
    display: inline;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: #2d2d2d;
    opacity:0.85;
    margin-left:-15px;
}
#cookiescript_manage #cookiescript_manageicon .cookiescript_gear {
    fill: #2d2d2d;
}
#cookiescript_manage:hover #cookiescript_manageicon .cookiescript_gear {
    fill: #0777da;
}

svg#cookiescript_manageicon {
    width: 15px;
    height: 15px;
    display: inline;
    margin: 0 5px 0 0;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    top: 3px;
    vertical-align: baseline;
}

.cookiescript-extra-links{
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    padding-top: 5px;
}
#cookiescript_injected.hascookiereport .cookiescript-extra-links{
    display:none;
}
.cookiescript-extra-links a{
    color: #0777da;
    border: 0;
    padding: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    margin: 0 15px;
    transition: all 100ms ease 0s;
    background-color: transparent;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-decoration: none;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    display: inline-block;
}
.cookiescript-extra-links a:hover{
    color: #1b82dd;
    text-decoration: underline;
}


#cookiescript_header {
    background-color: transparent;
    z-index: 999998;
    color: #2d2d2d;
    font-size: 18px;
    line-height: 1.3;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.4px;
    opacity:1;
}
.cookiescript_checkbox {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
}
input.cookiescript_checkbox_input {
}
span.cookiescript_checkbox_text {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin: 0;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #2d2d2d;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

#cookiescript_save {
    border: 0;
    transition: all 0.25s ease 0s;
    background-color: #0777da;
    color: #ffffff;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 3.2;
    letter-spacing: 0.4px;
}
/*IE 9 fixes*/
@media screen and (min-width:0\0) and (min-resolution: .001dpcm) {
    .cookiescript_checkbox_label {
        position: relative;
        top:-10px;
    }
    #cookiescript_accept, #cookiescript_reject, #cookiescript_save{
    	display: inline-block;
    }
    #cookiescript_buttons{
    	text-align:center;
    }
}
#cookiescript_save{
    display: none;
}
#cookiescript_reject {
    border: 1px solid #2d2d2d;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 3;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.4px;
    color: #2d2d2d;
    background: #FFFFFF;
}
#cookiescript_accept {
	transition: all 0.25s ease 0s;
	text-transform: uppercase;
	font-size: 12px;
	text-align: center;
	letter-spacing: 0.4px;
	border: 0;
	background-color: #0777da;
	color: #ffffff;
	line-height: 3.2;
}

#cookiescript_accept, #cookiescript_reject, #cookiescript_save {
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    white-space: nowrap;
    transition-duration: 100ms;
    transition-timing-function: ease-in-out;
    min-width: 103px;
}
.cookiescript_bigger {

#cookiescript_fsd_wrapper {
    /*animation: expandBox 2s forwards;*/
    max-width: 950px;
	width: 95%;

	top: 5%;

    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
	background-color: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 999997;

@keyframes expandBox {
    from {
        width: 10%;
        margin-left:0;
        overflow: hidden;
        top:90%;
        height: 5%;

    to {

}

.cookiescript_fsd_tabs {

.cookiescript_fsd_tabs > div {

	font-size: 16px;
	text-align: center;
	line-height: 1.6;
	font-weight: bold;
	border-top: 2px solid transparent;
	transition: all 300ms ease 0s;
	padding: 10px 20px;
	display: flex;
	justify-content: center;
	align-items: center;
	background-color: #ffffff;

.cookiescript_fsd_tabs > .cookiescript_active {
    border-top: 2px solid #0777da;

.cookiescript_fsd_tabs_content {
    background-color: #f3f3f3;
    padding: 5px 50px 10px 50px;
    width: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    flex-grow: 1;
	--scrollbar-width: 8px;
	--mask-height: 35px;
	--mask-image-content: linear-gradient( to bottom, transparent, black var(--mask-height), black calc(100% - var(--mask-height)), transparent );
	--mask-size-content: calc(100% - var(--scrollbar-width)) 100%;
	--mask-image-scrollbar: linear-gradient(black, black);
	--mask-size-scrollbar: var(--scrollbar-width) 100%;
	mask-image: var(--mask-image-content), var(--mask-image-scrollbar);
	mask-size: var(--mask-size-content), var(--mask-size-scrollbar);
	mask-position: 0 0, 100% 0;
	mask-repeat: no-repeat, no-repeat;
	-webkit-mask-image: var(--mask-image-content), var(--mask-image-scrollbar);
	-webkit-mask-size: var(--mask-size-content), var(--mask-size-scrollbar);
	-webkit-mask-position: 0 0, 100% 0;
	-webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat, no-repeat;
}

.cookiescript_fsd_tabs_content .cookiescript_hidden {

/*Switches color reload*/
#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled .mdc-switch__handle::after {
    background: #0777da;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:hover:not(:focus):not(:active) .mdc-switch__handle::after {
    background: #0f7cdc;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:focus:not(:active) .mdc-switch__handle::after {
    background: #0f7cdc;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:active .mdc-switch__handle::after {
    background: #0f7cdc;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:hover:not(:focus) .mdc-switch__ripple::before,
#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:hover:not(:focus) .mdc-switch__ripple::after{
    background: #0777da;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:focus .mdc-switch__ripple::before,
#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:focus .mdc-switch__ripple::after {
    background: #0777da;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:active .mdc-switch__ripple::before,
#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch.mdc-switch--selected:enabled:active .mdc-switch__ripple::after {
    background: #0777da;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch:enabled .mdc-switch__track::after {
    background: #0777da;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch:enabled:hover:not(:focus):not(:active) .mdc-switch__track::after {
    background: #0777da;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch:enabled:focus:not(:active) .mdc-switch__track::after {
    background: #0777da;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

#cookiescript_injected_fsd .mdc-switch:enabled:active .mdc-switch__track::after {
    background: #0777da;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

		overflow-y: auto;
		max-height: 140px;
	}
	.cookiescript_fsd_description{
		margin-top: 8px;
	}
	.cookiescript_fsd_tabs > div {
		padding: 6px;
		font-size: 12px;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_tabs_content {
		padding: 5px 20px 10px 20px;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table thead {
		display: none;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table td {
		display: flex;
		border-bottom: 0px;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table tr td:last-child {
		border-bottom: 0;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table td {
		border-top: 0;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table td::before {
		content: attr(label);
		font-weight: bold;
		width: 120px;
		min-width: 120px;
		text-align: left;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table td:nth-child(2):before {
		color: #1C1C1C;
	}

	.cookiescript_category_description {
		text-align: left;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table td:nth-child(1),
	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table th:nth-child(1) {
		padding-left: 7px;
		font-weight: bold;
		border-top: 1px solid #e2e2e2;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table tr:nth-child(1) td:nth-child(1),
	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table tr:nth-child(1) th:nth-child(1) {
		border-top: 0px;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table td:last-child {
		border-bottom: none;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table tr:nth-child(even) {
		background: #f5f5f5;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_cookies_table tr:nth-child(even) td {
		border-bottom: 0px solid #FFF;
	}

	#cookiescript_injected_fsd #cookiescript_buttons {
		margin-bottom: 0;
	}

	#cookiescript_injected_fsd #cookiescript_buttons #cookiescript_accept,
	#cookiescript_injected_fsd #cookiescript_buttons #cookiescript_save,
	#cookiescript_injected_fsd #cookiescript_buttons #cookiescript_reject {
		flex-grow: 1;
		margin-left: 10px;
		margin-right: 10px;
		margin-top: 5px;
		margin-bottom: 5px;
		padding: 0 15px;
	}

	.cookiescript_fsd_language_drop_down {
		right: 40px;
	}

	#cookiescript_injected_fsd #cookiescript_close{
		right:14px;
	}
    .cookiescript_fsd_reportby {
        position: relative;
        bottom: 0;
        right: auto;
        color: #1C1C1C;
        font-size: 12px;
        padding: 0 20px 10px 21px;
        max-width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.8;
        display: none;
    }
    #cookiescript_fsd_reportlink, #cookiescript_fsd_cookiescriptlink{
        color: #1C1C1C;
        font-size: 12px;
    }

    #cookiescript_fsd_wrapper .cookiescript-extra-links{
        flex-direction: column;
    }
    
}





.cookiescript_rtl {
    direction:rtl;
}

#cookiescript_injected_wrapper {
    background-color: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.5) !important;
    position: fixed;
    padding: 0;
    width: 100%;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    z-index: 999996;
}
#cookiescript_injected {
    width: 70%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 18px;
    letter-spacing: normal;
    position: fixed;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    padding: 15px 20px 15px 20px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    text-align: center;
    background-color: #FFFFFF;
    z-index: 999997;
    opacity: 1;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: normal;
    font-family: 'Open Sans', Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica', sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 1px 2px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
    color: #2d2d2d;
    align-items: center;
    max-height: 80%;
    overflow-y: auto;
    outline: none;
    max-width: 800px;
}
#cookiescript_copyright {
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1;
}
#cookiescript_buttons {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 0 15px 0;
}
#cookiescript_manage_wrap {
    margin: 0 0 10px 0;
}
#cookiescript_header {
    padding: 0;
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-right: 25px;
    margin-left: 25px;
}
#cookiescript_checkboxs {
    margin: 0 auto 15px auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.cookiescript_checkbox {
    margin: 0;
}
.cookiescript_checkbox_text {
    margin: 0 20px 0 5px;
}
#cookiescript_accept, #cookiescript_reject, #cookiescript_save {
    margin: 5px 7px;
    flex-shrink: 1;
    padding: 0 30px;
}
#cookiescript_description {
    margin: 0 auto 15px;
    text-align: center;
    max-width: 600px;
}

.cookiescript_checkbox_label{
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0 10px 0 -2px;
}
#cookiescript_cookietablewrap {
    transition: height 300ms 0ms, min-height 300ms 0ms, max-height 300ms 0ms, opacity 200ms 300ms;
}
#cookiescript_cookietablewrap.cookiescript_hidden {
    transition: height 300ms 0ms, min-height 300ms 0ms, max-height 300ms 0ms, opacity 200ms 0ms;
}

#cookiescript_tabscontent{
    position: relative;
    top: -1px;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 440px) {
    #cookiescript_injected{
        padding:15px;
        width: 95%;
    }

    #cookiescript_header{
        margin: 0 0 10px 0;
        text-align: left;
            margin-right: 25px;
        }
    #cookiescript_description{
        text-align: left;
    }
    #cookiescript_show_all_partners_button{
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
    }
    #cookiescript_description,
    #cookiescript_buttons{
        margin-bottom:10px;
    }

    #cookiescript_checkboxs{
        flex-direction: column;
    }
    #cookiescript_buttons{
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    #cookiescript_checkboxs{
        margin: 0 auto 15px 0;
    }
    .cookiescript_checkbox {
        margin: 0 0 -10px 0;
    }
    #cookiescript_accept, #cookiescript_reject, #cookiescript_save {
        width:100%;
    }
    #cookiescript_injected {
        max-height: 100%;
    }
}
#cookiescript_accept, #cookiescript_reject, #cookiescript_save {
	border-radius: 8px;
}

#cookiescript_injected {
	border-radius: 10px;
}


/*IE 9 fixes*/
@media screen and (min-width:0\0) and (min-resolution: .001dpcm) {
    .cookiescript_checkbox{
        display: inline-block;
    }
}

#cookiescript_accept, #cookiescript_save {
    order: 1;
}
    </style>
